name: Low-Calorie Spiced Tea Mix
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup + 2 tbsp orange flavored drink mix (sugar-free)
3/4 cup Iced tea mix, sugar free
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and stir until fully blended.
Store the mixture in an airtight container.
2. For each serving, add 1 teaspoon of the mix to a cup.
Add 1 cup of hot water and stir well. Serve hot.
Food Exchange Per Serving: FREE; CAL: 1; CAR: TR; PRO: TR; FAT: TR; SOD: 1 MG
